title: aster altaicus var. altaicus
intro: Aster altaicus var. altaicus, also known as Korean white aster, is a plant species in the daisy family, native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. The herbal preparation of Aster altaicus var. altaicus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
